title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Floral Park, Queens | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Floral Park, Queens. Safe, humane bat extraction from attics and chimneys. Licensed experts. Call today for a free inspection!
intro: Floral Park's beautiful tree-lined streets and charming Tudor and Colonial homes provide ideal roosting spots for bats in attics, chimneys, and eaves. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional bat removal and exclusion services to safely eliminate bat colonies and prevent re-entry. Our humane methods protect both your Floral Park property and these important wildlife species.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Floral Park residents with safe, humane bat removal that complies with all New York State wildlife regulations. Our licensed technicians use proven exclusion techniques to ensure bats don't return, backed by our comprehensive warranty and same-day emergency service throughout Queens.
localContext: Floral Park's mature tree canopy and proximity to parks like Centennial Gardens and Crocheron Park attract bat populations seeking shelter in residential attics and commercial buildings. The neighborhood's mix of early 20th-century homes with multiple entry points and the historic St. Hedwig's Roman Catholic Church area require specialized bat exclusion expertise to protect these valued structures.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Floral Park typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on colony size, entry point locations, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal in New York must follow strict guidelines. We use humane exclusion methods that allow bats to leave but not re-enter. Removal during maternity season (May 1 - August 15) is restricted to protect flightless young bats, so timing is crucial for legal compliance.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Floral Park attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching noises at dusk and dawn, bat droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, dark staining around potential entry holes, and seeing bats exit your home at sunset. Our free inspection will confirm bat presence and identify all entry points.

faqs.question: Will bats return after exclusion?
faqs.answer: When properly executed, our exclusion methods prevent bats from returning permanently. We seal all entry points (as small as 3/8 inch) using durable materials, install one-way exit devices, and provide a warranty on our work. Most Floral Park customers experience complete resolution after our service.
